heroSubhead: Residential, hospitality, and commercial interiors — framed as a set of project widgets.

categories.label: Residential
categories.heading: Calm, characterful homes.
categories.note: Layout-first thinking, material restraint, and lighting that behaves nicely at 8am and 11pm.

categories.label: Hospitality
categories.heading: Restaurants and social spaces.
categories.note: Atmosphere is engineered: threshold moments, circulation rhythm, and material choices that hold up under real service.

categories.label: Commercial
categories.heading: Workspaces and client-facing environments.
categories.note: Clarity wins: routes, zoning, and palettes that survive everyday use without turning into office-beige sadness.
